roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #1-#3 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:60 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  14  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #4 FOR LACK OF EVIDENCE,/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIALDRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENTAT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 30, 2014,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETIONTO MODIFY TREATMENT,PAROLE IS REINSTATED AS OF 9-10-14,/X:PAROLEE ORDEREDTO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
